subject: General Awareness
question_text: Which of the following statements correctly describes the Bharat Ratna with respect to its eligibility and status as of recent updates?

options.text: It is awarded only to Indian citizens for achievements in science
It is India's highest civilian award and can be awarded to non-citizens as well
It is awarded annually without exception to at least one recipient
It is limited to achievements in arts and literature only

solution.final_answer: India's highest civilian award; open to non-citizens

explanation.concept: Bharat Ratna is India's highest civilian honor and is not restricted by nationality or field; it recognizes exceptional service in any domain.
step_by_step: Understand scope of Bharat Ratna eligibility
Check whether nationality or field restrictions exist

why_correct.B: Correct because Bharat Ratna is India's highest civilian award and has been awarded to non-citizens like Nelson Mandela.

why_incorrect.A: Incorrect because it is not restricted to science or Indian citizens
why_incorrect.C: Incorrect as it is not necessarily awarded every year
why_incorrect.D: Incorrect because it is not limited to arts and literature
